A letter from your child  ·  Father's Day 2026

For You, Dad

The kind of man Scripture talks about

"Train up a child in the way he should go." You didn't just teach me that verse, you lived it in front of me every single day.

Scroll

A letter to you

✦

Happy Father's Day, Dad. I don't think there's a perfect way to say this, so I'll just tell you the truth.

You are the kind of man Scripture talks about. Not because you're perfect, but because of how you've loved us. You showed me what it looks like when a man leads with humility instead of pride, when strength protects instead of controls, when love stays patient even when it's hard to be.

You gave me your time, your patience, your example. You showed me integrity when no one was watching, and grace when I messed up. You worked hard quietly, prayed for me before I understood prayer, and never once made me doubt I was loved.

If I grow up to be even half the man you are, I'll consider my life a success.

I love you, I'm proud of you, and I am endlessly grateful that God gave me you.

What you've shown me

The man you are

Humility

Leading not with pride, but with quiet, steady strength used to protect, never to control.

Patience

Love that doesn't run out, even when it's hard to be patient. Especially then.

Faithfulness

Choosing what's right over what's convenient, again and again, without needing applause.

Integrity

Doing what's right even when no one's watching. That's where your character truly lives.

Grace

Forgiving when it wasn't deserved, correcting with love, never letting me doubt I was wanted.

Quiet Sacrifice

Working hard not for recognition, but because loving us was always worth the cost.

Our story in pictures

Words for you

What Scripture says

1
"

Train up a child in the way he should go; even when he is old he will not depart from it.

Proverbs 22:6

2
"

As a father shows compassion to his children, so the Lord shows compassion to those who fear him.

Psalm 103:13

3
"

The father of the righteous will greatly rejoice; he who fathers a wise son will be glad in him.

Proverbs 23:24

Always and forever

I love you, Dad

Thank you for being a living example of what it means to walk with God and lead a family with love.

✦

Happy Father's Day · 2026
